title: Duper's Auto Walk
description: A simple mod that allows you to walk without holding the forward key.
body:
# Duper's Auto Walk This is a simple mod that adds a keybind, allowing the player to move forward without pressing the **W** key! **WARNING: make sure that when using this mod on a server, you are not breaking any rules! Auto Walking is some times considered unfair advantage**

## Compatibility - The Fabric version supports **ModMenu**, allowing the user to customize the Auto Walking Icon's position and whether it should be shown or not. - Compatibility with InvMove is currently not reliable. ## Example ![Auto Walk](https://i.imgur.com/BaV9xl8.gif) ## License [MIT](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/) ## Contacts Issues - [https://github.com/Dupernite/DuperAutoWalk/issues](https://github.com/Dupernite/DuperAutoWalk/issues)
